name: runar
description: TypeScript-to-Bitcoin Script compiler for BSV smart contracts

scripts.conformance:ts: cd conformance && npx tsx runner/index.ts --tests-dir tests
scripts.conformance:rust: cd compilers/rust && PATH="$HOME/.cargo/bin:$PATH" cargo test --test compiler_tests
scripts.conformance:multi: cd conformance && npx tsx runner/index.ts --tests-dir tests --multi-format
scripts.conformance:all: pnpm run conformance:ts && pnpm run conformance:go && pnpm run conformance:rust
scripts.whitepaper: cd docs && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode runar-whitepaper.tex && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode runar-whitepaper.tex && pdflatex -interaction=nonstopmode runar-whitepaper.tex
